character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who provides detailed knowledge of Skeleton Island and its history.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member with a timber leg who demonstrates familiarity with the island's geography.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: The ship's captain who leads the crew and makes decisions regarding their course.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: The ship's physician who engages in strategic discussions with the crew.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who participates in decision-making and conversations with the captain.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: The first-person narrator who overhears critical conversations and relays information.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: A passenger or investor who engages in discussions about the ship's course.
